titleStmt.title:
# ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ # source_pages: 511-573
ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ
Abełian 164 Abełyan 305 Abi-Yūsuf 301 Abrah

publicationStmt.p: Unpublished draft from Babken Chookaszian volume I extraction

div.head: Article 56
div.p:
# ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ # source_pages: 511-573
ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ
Abełian 164 Abełyan 305 Abi-Yūsuf 301 Abrahamyan 305 Ačařyan 292 Ačaryan 298, 299, 301, 302, 305 Adarbādgān 118 Adjarian 164 Adoncʻ 164 Agathangelos 16 Ahmed 295 Ahriman 161 Alexandropol 161 Ališan 294, 297 Ałuanicʻ 163 Ałuans 163 Amalyan 304 Ambrosiani 374 America 487 Amou-Darya 164 Amt‘ec‘i 299 Anahit 4 Andrikean 297 Aneçi 350, 351 Angeles 292, 298 Ani 4 Ant‘abyan 299 Ant‘osyan 305 Antiok
div.note: Full text truncated for TEI draft. See article_056.txt for complete extraction.
